# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Build script name to execute (must exist in ./scripts/build/)'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - build-frontend.sh
          - build-backend.sh
          - build-docs.sh
          - build-full.sh
      deploy_target:
        description: 'Deployment target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production
          - development
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Deploy script name to execute (must exist in ./scripts/deploy/)'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - deploy-app.sh
          - deploy-static.sh
          - deploy-services.sh
      build_args:
        description: 'Additional build arguments (alphanumeric, dashes, underscores, dots, equals only)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    outputs:
      sanitized_build_args: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.build_args }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate and sanitize inputs
        id: sanitize
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # Validate build_args contains only safe characters
          BUILD_ARGS="${{ inputs.build_args }}"
          if [[ -n "$BUILD_ARGS" ]]; then
            if ! echo "$BUILD_ARGS" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9 _\-\.=]+$'; then
              echo "::error::build_args contains invalid characters. Only alphanumeric, spaces, dashes, underscores, dots, and equals are allowed."
              exit 1
            fi
            # Reject any attempt at command injection patterns
            if echo "$BUILD_ARGS" | grep -qE '[\$\`\;\|\&\>\<\(\)\{\}\[\]!#~\?\*\\\"'"'"']'; then
              echo "::error::build_args contains potentially dangerous characters."
              exit 1
            fi
            # Limit length
            if [ ${#BUILD_ARGS} -gt 256 ]; then
              echo "::error::build_args exceeds maximum length of 256 characters."
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          echo "build_args=${BUILD_ARGS}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: self-hosted
    environment: ${{ inputs.deploy_target }}
    timeout-minutes: 30
    env:
      DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ inputs.deploy_target }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Verify build script exists and is safe
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          SCRIPT_PATH="./scripts/build/${{ inputs.build_script }}"

          # Ensure no path traversal
          REAL_PATH=$(realpath --relative-to="./scripts/build" "$SCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)
          if [[ "$REAL_PATH" == ../* ]] || [[ "$REAL_PATH" == /* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Path traversal detected in build script path."
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script '${{ inputs.build_script }}' not found in ./scripts/build/"
            exit 1
          fi

          # Verify the script is tracked by git (not injected)
          if ! git ls-files --error-unmatch "$SCRIPT_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "::error::Build script is not tracked by git. Only committed scripts can be executed."
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "Build script validated: $SCRIPT_PATH"

      - name: Execute build script
        shell: bash
        env:
          SANITIZED_BUILD_ARGS: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.sanitized_build_args }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          SCRIPT_PATH="./scripts/build/${{ inputs.build_script }}"
          chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"

          echo "::group::Running build script: ${{ inputs.build_script }}"
          # Pass build args as a single quoted argument to prevent splitting/injection
          if [ -n "$SANITIZED_BUILD_ARGS" ]; then
            "$SCRIPT_PATH" "$SANITIZED_BUILD_ARGS"
          else
            "$SCRIPT_PATH"
          fi
          echo "::endgroup::"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ./build/output/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy:
    needs: [validate-inputs, build]
    runs-on: self-hosted
    environment: ${{ inputs.deploy_target }}
    timeout-minutes: 20
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-${{ inputs.deploy_target }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    env:
      DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ inputs.deploy_target }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ./build/output/

      - name: Verify deploy script exists and is safe
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          SCRIPT_PATH="./scripts/deploy/${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"

          # Ensure no path traversal
          REAL_PATH=$(realpath --relative-to="./scripts/deploy" "$SCRIPT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true)
          if [[ "$REAL_PATH" == ../* ]] || [[ "$REAL_PATH" == /* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Path traversal detected in deploy script path."
            exit 1
          fi

          if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script '${{ inputs.deploy_script }}' not found in ./scripts/deploy/"
            exit 1
          fi

          # Verify the script is tracked by git
          if ! git ls-files --error-unmatch "$SCRIPT_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script is not tracked by git. Only committed scripts can be executed."
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "Deploy script validated: $SCRIPT_PATH"

      - name: Require production approval confirmation
        if: inputs.deploy_target == 'production'
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "::warning::Production deployment initiated by ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Deploying to PRODUCTION with script: ${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"

      - name: Execute deploy script
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          SCRIPT_PATH="./scripts/deploy/${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"
          chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"

          echo "::group::Running deploy script: ${{ inputs.deploy_script }} targeting ${{ inputs.deploy_target }}"
          "$SCRIPT_PATH" "${{ inputs.deploy_target }}"
          echo "::endgroup::"

      - name: Verify deployment health
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [ -f "./scripts/healthcheck.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/healthcheck.sh
            ./scripts/healthcheck.sh "${{ inputs.deploy_target }}"
          else
            echo "::warning::No healthcheck script found at ./scripts/healthcheck.sh - skipping health verification"
          fi

  cleanup:
    needs: [build, deploy]
    runs-on: self-hosted
    if: always()
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - name: Clean up workspace
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Cleaning up build artifacts from runner workspace"
          rm -rf ./build/output/ || true

      - name: Report workflow status
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Workflow completed"
          echo "  Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "  Build script: ${{ inputs.build_script }}"
          echo "  Deploy script: ${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"
          echo "  Target: ${{ inputs.deploy_target }}"
          echo "  Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
